steps.title: Evaluate the functions at x = 3
steps.content:
First, find $f(3)$ using $f(x) = x + 2$:
$$f(3) = 3 + 2 = 5$$
Next, find $g(3)$ using $g(x) = 2x$:
$$g(3) = 2(3) = 6$$

steps.title: Compute the expression 6f(3) - g(3)
steps.content:
Substitute the values we found:
$$6f(3) - g(3) = 6(5) - 6 = 30 - 6 = 24$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
